narrative:
Auglaize Township has 909 registered voters, with 56.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 25.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 18.2%, a clear Republican lean of 7.3 percentage points.
